xcalibur-bugfill.name: X-SHIELD BUGFILL
xcalibur-bugfill.description: High-build epoxy bug hole filler, skim coat and general-purpose adhesive. Two-component epoxy for filling blowholes, surface crack filling, skim-coating, tank lining, bedding mortar, and anchor-bolt installation.
application_areas: Surface crack filling, skim coating, cap-sealing

xcalibur-xseal-pu25.name: X-SEAL PU25
xcalibur-xseal-pu25.description: One-part fast-curing low-modulus polyurethane sealant. Moisture-cure, elastomeric seal with high elasticity. Good adhesion to most industrial substrates (glass, anodized aluminum, lacquered metal, wood, FRP, concrete) without primer.
xcalibur-xseal-pu25.classification: ISO 11600 class 25 LM (low-modulus); SCAQMD Rule 1168 / LEED VOC compliant
application_areas: High-movement joints in concrete and masonry
xcalibur-xseal-pu25.chemical_resistance: Sewage, sabkha, mineral acids, alkalis, salt water
